

# Welcome
<a name="welcome"></a>

The * AWS GovCloud (US) User Guide* provides information about setting up your AWS GovCloud (US) account, identifies the differences between AWS GovCloud (US) Regions and other standard AWS Regions, defines usage guidelines for processing export-controlled data within AWS GovCloud (US), and setting up and using AWS Services in the AWS GovCloud (US) Regions. In this guide, the term AWS GovCloud (US) Regions refer to both AWS GovCloud (US-West) and AWS GovCloud (US-East) Regions. In this guide, we assume you are familiar with [Amazon Web Services (AWS)](https://aws.amazon.com/).

For a list of AWS or AWS GovCloud (US) related resources, see [Related Resources](govcloud-related-resources.md).

More information related to the releases in AWS GovCloud (US) can be found at [What’s new with AWS GovCloud (US)](https://aws.amazon.com/govcloud-us/whats-new).
